jd_text: Company Description PEM Strategy is an agile consultancy delivering measurable results through its innovative approach. Combining top-tier consulting expertise with profound regional insights, PEM Strategy partners with public and private sector clients to drive growth and transformation. The company focuses on sustainable solutions and long-term success, reinventing the traditional consulting model. Through senior-led teams with an execution-first mindset, PEM Strategy ensures impactful outcomes across diverse industries. Role Description This is a full-time, on-site role based in Riyadh for the position of Chief of Staff (Mid-Level) . This role is designed for mid-career professionals and is not a senior executive position . The Chief of Staff will work closely with senior leadership to support the prioritization and execution of key organizational initiatives. The role is primarily focused on coordination, execution, and operational support , rather than strategic ownership. Key responsibilities include: Supporting the planning and execution of cross-functional projects Coordinating internal teams and shared resources (e.g., graphics, proposals) Assisting in the preparation of project proposals and scope of work documents Tracking progress of projects and ensuring timely delivery / handover Contributing to talent acquisition and internal operational processes This role offers strong exposure to leadership and strategic projects while maintaining a hands-on, execution-focused scope. Qualifications 3–4 years of professional experience (consulting or related fields preferred) Strong organizational, coordination, and stakeholder management skills Excellent written and verbal communication skills, including report writing and presentations Ability to work effectively in fast-paced environments with tight deadlines Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Business, Management, Public Administration, or a related field
